name: swift-agent-kit
description: Swift development kit for Claude Code: house Swift 6/SwiftUI standards, real Apple docs lookup (local SDK + DocC JSON), an empirically-built operating guide for Xcode 27's MCP server, and Apple's own Xcode 27 agent skills — installed by extracting them from your local Xcode, since Apple's license doesn't permit redistributing them. A SessionStart hook nudges until extraction has run.
license: MIT (original content; extracted Apple content remains Apple's — see README)
